hook: AI gave you a 5-paragraph essay when you needed a one-liner. Again.
caption:
AI gave you a 5-paragraph essay when you needed a one-liner. Again.

Here's what's actually happening: the AI doesn't know if you're someone who wants the full context or someone who wants the answer in 8 words.

So it guesses. And it almost always guesses wrong FOR YOU specifically.

The people who get clean, direct answers from AI? They've either spent 20 minutes writing a prompt that explains their entire personality... or they have something that does it for them.

BootFile builds your thinking profile once — your communication style, how you process information, whether you want caveats or just the conclusion — and loads it into every conversation automatically.

No more re-explaining yourself.
No more 'can you make that shorter.'
No more AI writing to a person who is nothing like you.

The AI was never broken. It just didn't know you.
